content: Most existing explorations of Self-Refine only treat it as a single-perspective iterative improvement framework for LLM outputs, while LLM self-reflection mechanisms that introduce multiple inconsistent problem-solving perspectives can be embedded into the iteration loop of Self-Refine to break its limitation of falling into local optimal traps caused by single-perspective self-feedback. This cross-pollination creates a multi-perspective Self-Refine framework that still retains the original advantage of requiring no extra supervised training or model fine-tuning.
